zotero.abstractNote: We propose Neural Interpreters, a framework for modular and compositional computation. Neural Interpreters consist of a set of reusable neural modules and a controller that dynamically selects and executes these modules to solve a given task. This allows the model to adapt its computation to the input, leading to improved generalization and interpretability. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on a variety of tasks, including symbolic reasoning, image classification, and reinforcement learning, where it outperforms monolithic baselines and existing modular architectures.
